programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In these Central division battles, Kaleb “Doc Thor” Redden goes up against Michael “Opera Man” Hewitt and Dani Speegle takes on Nadi Carey. Winning male competitors will advance to face reigning Titan Joe Thomas and the winning female will challenge reigning Titan Chantae McMillan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: Reigning Titans Joe Thomas and Dani Speegle are one victory away from advancing to the Titan Games Championship but standing in their way are six top competitors from the Central Region who have one last shot at redemption. The contenders must face off in a brand-new three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat Thomas and Speegle on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Western Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face professional stuntwoman and “American Ninja Warrior” star Jessie Graff, while the top man will advance to compete against Super Bowl champion Victor Cruz. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.desc: The Arcane Order pushes Douxie to make an impossible choice: save his friends ... or save the planet. Which will he pick? Only time will tell.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: When Zarkon demands a tradeoff, the team has a difference of opinion on what to do; Meanwhile, Haggarobsesses over the past

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When teamed up with her new friend Lerk, Eep's competitive side takes over when she sets out to win the first-ever school hunting exam at any cost.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky enlists Abigail Turo Snips and their horses to help plan a surprise birthday party for Pru that goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When the annual roundup and town dance brings cowboy Javier to Miradero Lucky finds a new friend who can teach her and Spirit a new trick.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty has trouble keeping all of the new Trux organized and cooperative, and D-Structs comes up with a plan that throws the crater into even more chaos.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Fleshed Out Wolfie wakes up one morning to every creature's nightmare?he's turned into a human! Messy Business At The Manor When Mosshead has nowhere to go for vacation, Casper invites him to stay at his uncles' house…where he quickly discovers that Mosshead is the world's worst houseguest.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Paramedic Paranormal When Jimmy breaks out in hives, Casper and his friends have no choice but to bring him to the human hospital. Back To Ghoul When Casper's uncles Stinky, Fatso and Stretch decide to go back to Scare School, Casper is thrilled.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and friends are going apple picking by the river. It's a hot day, so Ping Pong offers to magic up some fizzy apple drink for them all to drink afterwards. But her spell goes very wrong, sending giant apples rolling down into the river. Just as Rupert is suggesting Ping Pong try again they are all amazed to see Ming float by, surrounded by apply-bubbles. Ping Pong's giant magic apples have turned the river into a fizzy apple juice river, and the bubbles make you float. Soon Rupert and friends are having a great time, sucking in bubbles and floating about. But then Edward notices a problem. The apples are causing a log jam at the bridge and unless they can get them out, the river will flood. How will they get the river back to normal and prevent Nutwood being swept away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Freddy and Freda “borrow” Ping Pong's Magic Book and accidentally say a spell that makes their toy cupboard float off across Nutwood. Rupert takes charge of trying to stop the runaway item of furniture before it does any damage, trying to lasso it. But the Fox Twins meddle again, and Ping Pong gets tangled up in the lasso, ends up floating high in the sky, dangling from the flying cupboard! Things become even more serious when she floats out over the sea and gets stranded on a rock. Rupert has to make the Fox Twins face up to the trouble they've caused, and find a way to undo the magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all together!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: The Practical Guide to Love
programme.desc: Based on webtoon, the series follows a woman who goes on a blind date, meets two charming guys, and navigates her feelings to discover true love.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: One Night Food Trip- International Edition

programme.title: Painfully Delicious!

programme.title: Inheritors

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Heather and Phil investigate Ocracoke Island, where locals still fear Blackbeard's ghost. Is he guarding long-lost treasure, or seeking his revenge?

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Rick goes on a midnight run to stake new ground for his empire. While fixing Monster Red, he discovers she's hiding a surprising amount of gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Tony's crew defects to Parker's, leaving him to rely on less experienced operators. Parker's new hires create animosity as the team opens a new cut.

programme.title: The Many Lives Of Benjaman Kyle (S1)
programme.desc: His cryptic remarks about a 1970s murder deepen fears that Powell's alleged mob past, and threats against the producers, must be taken seriously.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew investigates reports of shape-shifting creatures in Upper Fruitland, NM.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective (S4)
programme.desc: As Det. Mechelle Soehlig pieces together the victim's final steps, a trail of clues lead her from the site of a late-night house party to a mysterious Icelandic biker.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike Brewer tests the market with a customised pick-up. Mrs. Brewer hatches an expansion plan, and the team take on an 1980s hot hatch restoration.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: Mike finds an Alfa Romeo GTV with some fails, but he reckons Elvis can sort it. Can he get it ready for an Italian road trip to re-create the GTV Cup?

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S8)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S8)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Expedition Files: Blood In The Water (S1)
programme.desc: There's blood in the water as Josh Gates investigates the strangest shark mysteries ever told.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: This special episode of Dual Survival goes behind the scenes with the show's crew to get the scoop on who is leaving and who's moving on with a new partner.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (SW Special) (S2)
programme.desc: In the summer of 2024, dozens of cameras captured a rare outbreak of shark attacks along America's Gulf Coast.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: Wu Zetian, the only female emperor in Chinese history, inherited the rule of Zhenguan and ushered in the prosperous Kaiyuan era.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike Brewer tests the market with a customised pick-up. Mrs. Brewer hatches an expansion plan, and the team take on an 1980s hot hatch restoration.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: The three-story home is so packed, the front door won't open. Matt hunts for a serviceman's foreign currency collection. Extensive repairs drive up costs.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Otto explores the culture of the indigenous Yvyrhareta population. They prepare natural medicines and participate in the traditional fire dance.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: When a gunman turns on his family in Utah, police use drones to hunt him down before there’s another victim. In South Carolina, cameras capture a deadly street brawl.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight_S2 (S2)
programme.desc: Racers line up in Tulsa, Oklahoma, for the fifth week of the Great 8 - and everyone's gunning for Kye. Changing temperatures challenge the drivers.

programme.title: Rear Window
programme.desc: When professional photographer J.B. “Jeff” Jeffries is confined to a wheelchair, he becomes obsessed with watching the private dramas of his neighbours play out across the courtyard.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army

programme.title: Rush Hour 3

programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Blindsided (aka Penthouse North)
programme.desc: A reclusive, blind photojournalist lives quietly in a New York penthouse, until a smooth but sadistic criminal looking for a hidden fortune enters her life.

programme.title: Survivor 50 - EP 9
programme.desc: A record 24 castaways return to Fiji for this milestone 50th anniversary season, ranging from multi-season legends to New Era standouts.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 8
programme.desc: Talking Point investigates if Greek yoghurt is worth the splurge, comparing Greek and Greek-style versions in the lab and answers whether it’s worth the premium you pay.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 7
programme.desc: In the series finale, three women with chronic pain search for hope through treatment, independence, love and the courage to keep going.

programme.title: Arts 21 - EP 456
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Euromaxx - EP 456
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02 - EP 5
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 60
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: Taste Of The Country - EP 5
programme.desc: A brand-new lifestyle and cooking show with chef-turned-farmer Julius Roberts, A Taste of the Country shows how a wonderful change-of-life plan comes together. Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in your kitchen... wherever you live!

programme.title: (Live) FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-Show - Group Stage: Scotland v Morocco
programme.desc: Pre-Show for FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: Game On - EP 4
programme.desc: A national netball player known for her speed, agility, and teamwork steps into the world of fencing---guided by a fencer half her age. With years of perfecting her footwork and precision on the court, she now faces a new challenge: mastering the art of swordplay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!! - EP 29

Players have the chance to win interesting prizes strategically placed on the game board, adding an extra layer of excitement.
